text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm taking a stroll<n>through the
streets...

text_block_list.name: Figure in Black A
text_block_list.text: ...Over here. Hurry.

text_block_list.name: Woman in Tuxedo
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! I cordially<n>welcome you to
our casino<n>tournament! The stakes—nothing but
your dignity as a high roller! Compete<n>to your
heart's content, for today and<n>today only! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for cryin' out loud. I thought I saw<n>a fish outta
water, and here you are<n>again.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Before you get any funny ideas, this<n>tournament is
completely legit, all<n>right? Despite the unregistered
busybodies stickin' their noses in.

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text:
Pssst! Look, it's her... The legendary<n>dealer—the
Angel of the Night! Oh, I<n>can't believe I get to see
her in<n>person!
choice_data_list: Isn't that the woman we ran into by the river?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my. Who do we have here? Hehe.<n>Long time
no see.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Well, well, well. Looks like YourHoliness is pretty popular.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, and I've chosen you as my<n>opponent.
What do you say? Care to<n>put your pride on the
line?

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: No way! An opponent handpicked bythe Angel herself? Who is that?Snicker. Nobody beats the Angel...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
The name of the game is roulette. You<n>lay down
your chips, and I'll spin the<n>wheel. We'll decide
this with a single<n>round, nice and simple.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't suppose there's any issue<n>with betting on
a color rather than a<n>number?

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Take your pick, black or red.<n>All right,
time to spin the wheel.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Angel throws the white roulette<n>ball onto the
spinning wheel. It makes<n>a strangely satisfying
sound as it<n>rolls, and the throng of bystanders
watch with sweaty palms and bated<n>breath.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Do you remember when we talked<n>about habits?
choice_data_list: You mean like with Special Week?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Competition sets your body into<n>a combative
state, no matter who<n>you're facing. That's why
habits<n>develop without one's knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
For example, when the Angel here's<n>aimin' for a
specific pocket, she has<n>a habit of rollin' the ball
to a certain<n>rhythm.

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
choice_data_list: Can you really tell something like that?
Can you really tell something like that?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
It helps that a dealer as well-known<n>as she has an
extensive amount of<n>material to study.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Plus, as someone who lives and<n>breathes the
races, I've developed<n>an internal clock to count
my laps. If I<n>combine that with what I know about
the Angel's habits...

text_block_list.name: Angel of the Night
text_block_list.text: Th-that's enough! Let's start over.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The game comes to a sudden halt.<n>They decide to
resume the match<n>after a short breather.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Are you worried that you might've<n>ruined my
plan? Haha... Not to worry.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I was just bluffing when I said all that<n>stuff about
her habits.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
And did you see how flustered she<n>looked? It paid
off in spades. With<n>this, she now knows that
underhanded tricks won't work.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do this. No more tricks,<n>just a bona
fide test of luck.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
...I bet on black. Who wants to bet on<n>the Angel
goin' down?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, the Angel of the Night<n>quickly
proclaims that bets are closed.<n>Soon after, the
white roulette ball<n>goes rolling and rolling, until...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The crowd goes wild. The ball has<n>landed in a
black pocket. Which<n>means... Nakayama Festa has
won.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But the real commotion comes after<n>the game,
when everyone realizes<n>that she has disappeared
from the<n>premises without playing anyone<n>else.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Days later, I spot Nakayama Festa at<n>the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you. Sorry to leave you in the<n>thick of it the
other day, but ya can't<n>blame anyone for wantin'
to get<n>away from all that commotion.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't after fame, after all. I just<n>wanted a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice there's a bus parked up<n>ahead of her.
Come to think of it, the<n>morning news said that
she's racing<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Heh, so you've heard. Well...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, black or white. Which do ya<n>wanna bet on?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Haha... Yeah, me too. All right, see ya<n>around.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I get the feeling that she can overtake<n>any racer
and claim victory today.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hey, black or white. Which do ya<n>wanna bet on?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Don't push yourself to answer. It's<n>normal to
waffle.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
I'd bet on white, though. No matter<n>who my
opponent is, I'll overtake<n>them. See ya around.
